message:
✨ MissionBrowser: progressive loading, import, repo link (#1491)

* 🐛 Fix MissionBrowser: connect to console-kb repo

- Route paths: /kb/browse → /browse, /kb/file → /file (match frontend)
- Repo: kubestellar/console → kubestellar/console-kb (where missions live)
- Branch: main → master (console-kb default branch)
- Transform GitHub 'dir' type to 'directory' (match BrowseEntry type)
- Fallback to server GITHUB_TOKEN for API auth (avoid rate limits)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ MissionBrowser: progressive search, import buttons, repo link

- Make browse/file API routes public (no JWT required) — fixes session expired
- Point backend at kubestellar/console-kb repo (master branch)
- Transform GitHub 'dir' type to 'directory' for frontend compatibility
- Progressive recommendation loading: cards appear as missions are found
- Dynamic search progress: shows current category, missions found, folders scanned
- 'Import to My Missions' button on every JSON file in directory listing
- 'Browse all solutions on GitHub' link to console-kb/solutions
- Server-side GITHUB_TOKEN fallback to avoid API rate limits

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
